## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between GrowthX and Onnivation for AI-powered content marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-driven content creation services, focusing on SEO and GEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Currently operates as a service-based agency, transitioning to a platform model in 3-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
  - [Onnivation sees potential in introducing GrowthX to their SaaS partners and clients in India/US](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Both parties are interested in exploring collaboration, starting with a single client opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [Solves content marketing challenges in the era of AI search](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Creates SEO and GEO-optimized content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Two-phase approach: strategy sprint (20-40K) and content creation (starting 15K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Uses AI workflows with human experts for high-quality, accurate content](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Clients include Ramp, Webflow, Reddit, and AugmentCode](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

### Onnivation's Business Model and Interest

  - [Represents SaaS companies in the Indian market](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=93.0)
  - [Typically takes 30-35% revenue share for SaaS partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Sees potential in offering GrowthX services to their partners (e.g., Cloudflare, CoraLogix)](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)
  - [Interested in improving their own content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)

### Partnership Exploration

  - [GrowthX currently focused on inbound leads, not actively seeking partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Onnivation proposes introducing GrowthX to 10+ SaaS partners](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)
  - [Discussed potential revenue sharing model vs. services-for-services exchange](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [GrowthX prefers services-for-services model at this stage](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)

### Potential Opportunities

  - [Possibility of pitching to a large Indian financial services company in San Francisco (Oct 9-10)](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1794.0)
  - [Onnivation to identify a suitable first client for a test case](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide information and deck for Onnivation to share with potential customers](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1931.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Saket to identify and propose a specific customer for initial collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)
  - [Tyler to discuss partnership potential with Marcel (GrowthX leadership)](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [GrowthX to send information and deck to Saket for sharing with potential customers](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1931.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to discuss concrete partnership structure and first opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/wpD4xbA_4Kbpp_kJN-Vf3FvwsWg_s-RE?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
